chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 804 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 13.01.2026 Mr. Illahi Bux Maitlo, Advocate for applicant. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Attaullah (Inspector Legal Railway) and Haseeb Sohail (SI / SHO, Railway Police Station Padidan)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter to some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned DAG does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, present bail application stands disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of two months hereof. J U D G E Abdul Basit
